top_signals.title: Ram unveils lineup of Hemi V-8 engine-powered 'muscle trucks' despite high gas prices
top_signals.summary: Stellantis plans to launch a new lineup of what it's calling "muscle trucks" for its Ram brand despite elevated U.S. gas prices due to the war in Iran.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: SEC reviewing implications of delayed prediction market ETFs, Atkins says
top_signals.summary: SEC Chair Paul Atkins said he instructed the agency's staff to seek public input on prediction market ETFs.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Commission sends Statements of Objections to several companies concerning synthetic turf cartels
top_signals.summary: European Commission Press release Brussels, 21 May 2026 The European Commission has informed several companies active in the synthetic turf sector of its preliminary view that they have breached EU antitrust rules by colluding to distort competition in synthetic turf for sports pitches in the Netherlands and Germany.
